Footer.description: Swiss AI technology company. AI-powered digital transformation solutions across 15 industry verticals with 271+ strategic domains.

Hero.subtitle: Building the Digital Infrastructure of the Future
Hero.description: Aipyram GmbH develops AI-native platforms across 15 industry verticals and leads global digital transformation with a portfolio of {domains}+ strategic digital assets.

Sectors.title: 15 Industry Verticals
Sectors.description: Each vertical operates with specialized AI agents and a curated domain portfolio. Data and experiences from one sector create value for all others through the Cross-Nexus protocol.

sectors.textile_desc: B2B marketplace, AI curtain design, supply chain optimization. Perde.ai, TrTex.com and Hometex.ai as main vertical.
sectors.construction_desc: Property valuation AI, area intelligence, smart real estate solutions. Serving Aegean coast and Swiss markets.
sectors.automotive_desc: Fleet management, taxi platforms, vehicle valuation AI. DACH and Turkey markets.
sectors.rental_desc: Worldwide rental network. City-based AI rental from New York to Tokyo, Dubai to Singapore.
sectors.aviation_desc: Flight search, airport AI, vacation planning. Mediterranean-focused tourism intelligence.
sectors.energy_desc: Solar panel optimization, energy monitoring, water treatment AI. Swiss and European energy market.
sectors.fintech_desc: Payment infrastructure, gold exchange intelligence, forex analysis. DACH and Turkey markets.
sectors.health_desc: Hospital management AI, home care (Spitex), medical analytics. Compatible with the Swiss healthcare system.
sectors.media_desc: Regional AI media platforms. City-based digital publishing from Istanbul to Berlin.
sectors.lottery_desc: Lottery analytics, prediction AI, statistics engine. European and Swiss markets.
sectors.law_desc: Legal document analysis, justice AI, municipal digital transformation.
sectors.ecommerce_desc: Digital marketplace, repair AI, security solutions. Multilingual e-commerce infrastructure.
sectors.pets_desc: Pet hotel management, animal care AI. DACH region focused.
sectors.cities_desc: City-based AI platforms. Smart city solutions and regional digital transformation.
sectors.corporate_desc: Aipyram core platform. Cross-Nexus protocol, central AI management.

Ecosystem.description: The Aipyram ecosystem operates as a single organic network with projects connected via Neural Protocol, 50+ autonomous AI agents, and cross-sector data flow.
Ecosystem.network_help: Hover over projects — see data flows and connections
Ecosystem.cta_desc: Contact us for project partnerships, domain acquisition, or AI infrastructure information.
Ecosystem.layer1_desc: Autonomous operating system uniting all projects, agents, and data sources in a single intelligence layer.
Ecosystem.layer2_desc: Real-time cross-sector data flow. Changes in one sector automatically reflect in other verticals.
Ecosystem.layer3_desc: 50+ autonomous software agents. Customized for each sector vertical, continuously growing agent ecosystem.
Ecosystem.layer4_desc: 271+ strategic domains. Each has the potential to become a project, a sector, or an AI solution.
Ecosystem.proj1_desc: AI-powered curtain design and visualization platform
Ecosystem.proj2_desc: Turkish B2B textile marketplace. Manufacturer-buyer matching.
Ecosystem.proj3_desc: Home textile trade fair and intelligence platform.
Ecosystem.proj4_desc: Smart real estate platform on the Aegean coast. AI valuation.

Domains.description: 271+ premium domains across 15 industry verticals. Each carries a strategic position and value creation potential in the AI-powered digital economy.
Domains.cta_desc: Contact us for information, price quotes, or partnership discussions about any domain in our portfolio.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: AI Technology & Innovation
About.description: Aipyram GmbH is an AI technology company based in Dietikon (Zürich). AI-powered digital transformation solutions are developed across 15 industry verticals with a portfolio of 271+ strategic domains.
About.vision_text: Developing AI-powered platforms across industry verticals to accelerate businesses' digital transformation. Ensuring that experiences and data from each sector form a mutually nourishing ecosystem.
About.mission_text: Building AI-native platforms that solve real business problems across 15 industry verticals. Offering accessible and reliable AI solutions with Swiss quality standards and entrepreneurial spirit.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.description: For partnership inquiries, domain acquisition, or technical collaboration.

Impressum.title: Impressum
Impressum.disclaimer_text: This website and its content are for informational purposes only. Aipyram GmbH assumes no liability for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided.
Impressum.copyright_text: All content on this website is protected by copyright. Any reproduction or distribution requires prior written consent from Aipyram GmbH.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Aipyram GmbH is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
Privacy.data_collection_text: We only collect personal data when you voluntarily provide it to us, e.g. through our contact form or the AI chatbot.
Privacy.ai_chatbot_text: Our AI chatbot is powered by Google Gemini. Your conversation data is processed to answer your queries and is not permanently stored.
Privacy.cookies_text: This website only uses technically necessary cookies. No tracking cookies are used.
Privacy.rights_text: Under Swiss data protection law and the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data.

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.alert: By using this website, you accept the following terms.

sections.scope_text: These terms apply to the use of all digital services and platforms provided by Aipyram GmbH.
sections.ip_text: All domain names, trademarks, content, and technologies are the property of Aipyram GmbH and are protected by Swiss and international law.
sections.domains_text: Domains listed on this website are strategic investments. Listings do not represent any direct connection to third-party brands.
sections.liability_text: Aipyram GmbH is not liable for indirect damages, data loss, or interruptions arising from the use of our services.
sections.privacy_text: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
sections.changes_text: Aipyram GmbH reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be published on this page.
sections.law_text: Swiss law applies. The place of jurisdiction is Zürich, Switzerland.

Investor.description: Aipyram GmbH builds the future of the digital economy with a premium domain portfolio of 271+ domains across 15 industry verticals and AI technology infrastructure. Explore strategic partnership, domain acquisition, and project investment opportunities.
Investor.vision_p1: In the digital economy, domain names are the digital equivalent of physical real estate. The right sectoral domain is the most critical digital asset determining a brand's global reach and credibility.
Investor.vision_p2: Aipyram doesn't just collect these assets — it has the capacity to build AI-powered, revenue-generating platforms on each one. perde.ai is the living proof.
Investor.vision_p3: .ai domains showed 400% usage growth in the last 5 years. Our portfolio is rapidly gaining value with the global rise of the .ai extension.
Investor.card_structure_text: GmbH registered company. All domain assets are protected under corporate ownership with transparent transfer processes.
Investor.card_growth_text: .ai is the world's fastest growing TLD. Domains in our portfolio carry both standalone value and project development potential.
Investor.card_experience_text: Decades of experience in the textile sector, combined with technology vision, created the capacity for AI solutions across 12 different industries.
Investor.models_desc: Flexible models aligned with your goals. From domain acquisition to project partnership — broad investment options.
Investor.model_domain_desc: Acquire strategic domains from our portfolio individually or in sector bundles. Each domain carries AI integration and sectoral value creation potential.
Investor.model_partner_desc: Joint project development on selected domains. You bring capital and industry knowledge, we provide technology and AI infrastructure.
Investor.model_tech_desc: Rights to use Neural Protocol, Cross-Nexus, and our AI agent infrastructure in your own projects. Bring your sectoral AI solutions to market quickly.
Investor.cta_desc: Contact us for detailed information about our domain portfolio, partnership models, or investments in existing projects.

Sponsor.description: Leverage the Aipyram AI ecosystem to strengthen your brand presence at the Hometex Fair. Supported by 271+ strategic domains and 50+ AI agents.

Sponsor.pkg1_f3: Digital booth page at Hometex Fair

Sponsor.pkg2_f1: Everything in the Exhibitor package, plus:
Sponsor.pkg2_f7: Monthly AI market trend reports (6 months)
Sponsor.pkg3_desc: Full Neural Protocol integration — your brand becomes part of the Aipyram AI ecosystem

SoftwarePower.description: Autonomous AI infrastructure managing 271+ domains across 15 industry verticals and constantly growing
SoftwarePower.cap1_desc: Strategic portfolio of 271+ premium domains. Each optimized for sectoral AI deployment and maximum digital asset value.
SoftwarePower.cap2_desc: Self-learning AI agent network trained with sector-specific data. Purpose-built agents for each industry vertical — constantly growing ecosystem.
SoftwarePower.cap3_desc: Our autonomous operating system unifies all domains, agents, and data sources in a 24/7 intelligence layer. Central nervous system.
SoftwarePower.cap4_desc: Changes in one sector trigger automatic responses in all connected verticals — real-time cross-industry intelligence flow.
SoftwarePower.cap5_desc: Zero hallucination policy. Every AI output is verified against verifiable sources. Complete audit tracking system.
SoftwarePower.cap6_desc: Our strategic AI commander coordinates all agents, allocates resources, manages priorities, and ensures timely task completion.

CorporateValues.description: Foundation of Aipyram GmbH — precision, transparency, and relentless innovation
CorporateValues.val1_desc: Every decision data-driven. Every output verified. We apply the highest engineering standards — accuracy is non-negotiable.
CorporateValues.val2_desc: We don't produce generic AI. Each of our 12 vertical solutions is purpose-built with deep industry knowledge and real-world validation.
CorporateValues.val3_desc: Our Data Integrity Shield ensures zero hallucinations. Every AI output is traced back to verified sources with complete audit trails.
CorporateValues.val4_desc: Neural Protocol runs 24/7. AI agents autonomously identify opportunities, allocate resources, and execute across 271+ domains.
CorporateValues.val5_desc: Registered GmbH company. All operations follow corporate governance principles and European data protection standards.
CorporateValues.val6_desc: We work with investors and business partners with a long-term value creation focus. From domain sales to project development — flexible business models.

DigitalAssets.description: Our portfolio spans 271+ premium domains across 15 industry verticals

FlagshipProjects.description: Aipyram ecosystem platforms create real business value — each powered by specialized AI agents.
FlagshipProjects.page_desc: Each project is an independent platform powered by sector-specific AI agents and the Cross-Nexus protocol. Together, they form the Aipyram ecosystem.
FlagshipProjects.cta_desc: Want to co-develop a project on a domain from our portfolio or invest in existing projects? Contact us.
FlagshipProjects.p1_desc: Platform that enables customers to design curtains in their homes with AI, compare prices, and place orders. Complete cycle from consumer to seller.
FlagshipProjects.p2_desc: B2B marketplace connecting textile manufacturers and buyers with AI-powered matching. Supply chain optimization and trade fair integration.
FlagshipProjects.p3_desc: Trade intelligence platform that analyzes trends at fairs like Heimtextil with AI, providing smart recommendations to buyers.
FlagshipProjects.p4_desc: AI-powered real estate platform on the Aegean coast with property valuation, area intelligence, and ROI forecasting. Multilingual support.
